channel.title: Adventure on Sanjay Majumdar
channel.description: Recent content in Adventure on Sanjay Majumdar

item.title: Exploring the Beauty of Nepal
item.description:
Nepal — The Land of Himalayas

Nepal is home to 8 of the world’s 14 highest peaks including Mount Everest.

Must Visit Places

  • 🏔️ Pokhara — City of lakes and mountains
  • 🛕 Kathmandu — Historic temples and culture
  • 🦏 Chitwan — Wildlife and nature

Stay tuned for detailed travel guides!
